description_long: This object is a plush stuffed toy resembling a bear, with a textured, curly surface that mimics the appearance of soft fur. The toy has a rounded head, two small ears, and a snout, with facial features that are faintly visible, including dark eyes and a subtle nose. Its arms and legs are short and stubby, positioned in a way that suggests a seated posture. The coloration is predominantly off-white or beige, with some areas appearing slightly darker, especially on the lower limbs. The surface appears worn and uneven, with some visible damage or missing material on the top of the head and the lower back. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the toy.
description: A plush, off-white stuffed bear with a textured, curly surface and faint facial features, seated with short limbs. The toy shows signs of wear and has no visible accessories or branding.
description_view_0: The left side of the stuffed bear is visible, showing the textured fur and the rounded shape of the head and body, with the left arm and leg partially extended.
description_view_1: The front of the bear is shown, with both eyes, nose, and the full face visible, as well as both arms and legs in a seated position. Some damage is visible on the top of the head.
description_view_2: The right side of the bear is visible, highlighting the curvature of the back and the right arm and leg, with the head slightly turned downward.
description_view_3: The back of the bear is shown, displaying the full rear surface, including the back of the head, body, and both legs. There is a noticeable hole or missing material at the lower back.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with faintly visible eyes and a subtle nose, giving a calm and gentle appearance. There is no visible mouth or pronounced emotion.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a seated posture with its arms and legs bent and positioned forward, and the head slightly tilted downward.
